title: Tar Heel Association of Disability Examiners (THADE) — Constitution and By-Laws
description: Governing constitution and by-laws of the Tar Heel Association of Disability Examiners (THADE), the North Carolina chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) in the Southeast Region. Covers name, NADE relationship, definitions, purposes, membership classes, limitations, officers (President, Vice President, Secretary, Treasurer), the Board of Directors, meetings, by-laws authorization, amendments; and in the by-laws: officer elections and duties, board duties, fiscal year, the nine standing committees (including the Dr. George Cooper Memorial Library and National Disability Professionals Week committees), regional representation, delegate selection for regional/national conferences, parliamentary authority, and by-law amendments. Last amended February 7, 2008.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — North Carolina Chapter (THADE)
source.title: Constitution and By-Laws of the Tar Heel Association of Disability Examiners (THADE)

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source file 'North-Carolina-Const-Bylaws.doc' (in the same directory); markdown formatting was machine-derived (two articles are both labeled 'ARTICLE II' in the constitution, an artifact preserved from the source). Document closes 'This document was last amended February 7, 2008', captured as temporal_coverage. NADE url is the organization site, not a deep link to this document.
